clean_story:
Now I will teach you With.

With is like your hand holding stick while hitting fruit—hand and stick work together, not alone. If you say "Ugh hit mammoth with rock!", it means rock helps you, like fire helps cook meat. No with? You throw rock alone, or eat meat raw. With ties two things like vine ties logs—one pulls, one follows. See with, see two things stuck in same hunt, same cave, same bite.
